prompt: The .gitignore file in our monorepo has a missing newline before the last entry, which means the last pattern isn't being applied and build artifacts are leaking into commits. Fix just the .gitignore.
Our docker-compose.yml has an indentation error on the volumes section of the postgres service. The compose file was working yesterday. I just need the YAML fixed so the service starts again.
The Makefile has a tab-vs-spaces issue on line 47 that's causing 'missing separator' errors. Everything else in the Makefile is fine. Just fix the whitespace on that recipe line.
Our CI pipeline broke because someone deleted the closing curly brace in the Jest config file. The rest of the config is correct. Repair the JSON so tests run again.
The migration script 20240315_add_index.sql has a syntax error — there's a comma after the last column in the CREATE INDEX statement. Fix the SQL so the migration applies cleanly.
Our package.json has a broken dependency version string: 'react': '^18.2.0a' which isn't a valid semver. It should be '^18.2.0'. Just fix that one version string.

The Kubernetes deployment manifest references a configmap named 'app-config' but the actual configmap is named 'app-cfg'. This one-word mismatch is preventing the pods from starting. Fix the reference.
Our requirements.txt has a corrupted line — it reads 'fl ask==2.3.0' with a space in the package name. pip install fails on that line. Just fix the typo so the install succeeds.
The nginx.conf has a missing semicolon after the proxy_pass directive. nginx -t reports the error on line 32. Fix the config so it validates.
Our Terraform module has a broken reference — it says 'var.instance_typ' instead of 'var.instance_type'. The plan fails with 'variable not declared'. Fix the typo in the variable reference.
